title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Ratna Sagar - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Ratna Sagar - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Ratna Sagar. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Madurai-based team.

About Ratna Sagar:
Ratna Sagar is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ratna Sagar!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
